attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.HEADER_ID HEADER_ID,                     
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID LINE_ID,                       
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE STATUS_RESULT_CODE,            
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_DATE STATUS_RESULT_DATE,            
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATED_PROGRAM_NAME CREATED_PROGRAM_NAME,          
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.PROGRAM_ID PROGRAM_ID,                    
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.REQUEST_ID REQUEST_ID,                    
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.ORG_ID ORG_ID,                        
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE,                 
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY,                    
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,             
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,            
EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID,ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN
WHERE ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID=EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID 
AND ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE=EX_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE)

SELECT
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE STATUS_RESULT_CODE,
CASE WHEN ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE = 'UNSCHEDULED' THEN NULL ELSE ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_DATE END STATUS_RESULT_DATE,
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATION_DATE,
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
NSOLT.SS_CODE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN
INNER JOIN 
(
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC NSOLT  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON NSOLT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE
) 
ON NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID
AND ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME

SELECT
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.HEADER_ID HEADER_ID,                     
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID LINE_ID,                       
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_CODE STATUS_RESULT_CODE,            
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.STATUS_RESULT_DATE STATUS_RESULT_DATE,            
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATED_PROGRAM_NAME CREATED_PROGRAM_NAME,          
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.PROGRAM_ID PROGRAM_ID,                    
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.REQUEST_ID REQUEST_ID,                    
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.ORG_ID ORG_ID,                        
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE,                 
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY,                    
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY,               
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,             
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,            
ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN
WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV_DAC NSOLT,$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC WHERE NSOLT.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT = ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.LINE_ID
AND ST_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_STATUS_LN.GLOBAL_NAME = NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME 
AND NSOLT.SS_CODE = NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE)
